prompt: holy shit why does the dashboard take like 10 seconds to load, I literally just opened the app and I'm staring at a blank screen, this is embarrassing if a client sees this

assertions.text: Response contains all 7 sections from the skill format
References real file paths from the codebase (e.g., app/api/dashboard/route.ts)
Proposes exactly 3 fixes ordered by effort level
Section 6 makes a clear recommendation rather than staying neutral
Section 7 names specific implementation changes (files, query keys, etc.)
Section 1 preserves the user's frustrated tone without sanitizing
